# SCORE Template Gallery for Business Planning, Financials, Marketing, and Operations

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, templates, business-plan, business-model-canvas, financial-projections, marketing-plan

## Resource purpose
Central template gallery for business plans, business model canvas, startup expenses, financial projections, cash flow, profit/loss, loan worksheets, marketing plan, target market, SWOT, and job analysis resources.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use when the entrepreneur needs a concrete worksheet/template to produce an output for a mentor, lender, planning process, launch plan, or operations review.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
Ideation, Validation, Formation, Launch, Mature Operations, Growth, and Exit/Transition.

## Key resources or subresources
- Business Plan Template for a Startup Business: https://www.score.org/templates/business-plan-template-a-startup-business/ — Formation and planning output for startup-stage users.
- Business Plan Template for an Established Business: https://www.score.org/templates/business-plan-template-established-business/ — Planning output for operating businesses.
- Business Model Canvas Template: https://www.score.org/templates/business-model-canvas-template/ — Ideation and Validation concept-mapping tool.
- Financial Projections Template: https://www.score.org/templates/financial-projections-template/ — Funding readiness and financial planning.
- Startup Expenses: https://www.score.org/templates/startup-expenses/ — Startup budget and cost estimate worksheet.
- Opening Day Balance Sheet: https://www.score.org/templates/opening-day-balance-sheet/ — Formation/launch financial snapshot.
- Balance Sheet Template: https://www.score.org/templates/balance-sheet-template/ — Ongoing financial statement support.
- Business Loan Estimator Tool: https://www.score.org/tools/business-loan-estimator-tool/ — Loan payment estimation education.
- Bank Loan Request for Small Business: https://www.score.org/articles/bank-loan-request-small-business/ — Loan request preparation article.
- Online Small Business Loan Worksheet: https://www.score.org/templates/online-small-business-loan-worksheet/ — Loan-readiness worksheet.
- Loan Amortization Schedule: https://www.score.org/templates/loan-amortization-schedule/ — Debt repayment schedule tool.
- Break-Even Analysis Template: https://www.score.org/templates/break-even-analysis-template/ — Validation, pricing, and profitability analysis.
- 12 Month Cash Flow Statement: https://www.score.org/templates/12-month-cash-flow-statement/ — Cash flow planning.
- 3-Year Cash Flow Statement: https://www.score.org/templates/3-year-cash-flow-statement/ — Longer-term cash flow projection.
- Financial History & Ratios: https://www.score.org/templates/financial-history-ratios/ — Operating business financial analysis.
- Personal Financial Statement Template: https://www.score.org/templates/personal-financial-statement-template-2/ — Potential lender-prep resource.
- 12-Month Profit and Loss Projection: https://www.score.org/templates/12-month-profit-and-loss-projection/ — Forecasting resource.
- 3-Year Profit and Loss Projection: https://www.score.org/templates/3-year-profit-and-loss-projection/ — Longer-term forecasting resource.
- Marketing Plan Guide: https://www.score.org/e-guides/marketing-plan-guide/ — Launch and growth marketing planning.
- Product and Service Description Worksheet: https://www.score.org/templates/product-and-service-description-worksheet/ — Offer clarification.
- Target Market Data Worksheet: https://www.score.org/templates/target-market-data-worksheet/ — Market research worksheet.
- Target Market Comparison Worksheet: https://www.score.org/templates/target-market-comparison-worksheet/ — Customer segment comparison.
- Distribution Channel Assessment Worksheet: https://www.score.org/templates/distribution-channel-assessment-worksheet/ — Channel planning.
- Annual Marketing Budget Template: https://www.score.org/templates/annual-marketing-budget-template/ — Marketing budgeting.
- Marketing Calendar Template: https://www.score.org/templates/marketing-calendar-template/ — Campaign scheduling.
- Business Health Check Tool: https://www.score.org/tools/business-health-check-tool/ — Operating business self-assessment.
- SWOT Analysis Worksheet: https://www.score.org/templates/swot-analysis-worksheet/ — Strategy assessment.
- Job Analysis Worksheet: https://www.score.org/templates/job-analysis-worksheet/ — Hiring and role design.

## BOSS routing notes
- For BOSS Ideation users, Business Model Canvas, Product/Service Description, Target Market worksheets, and Break-Even Analysis are usually better first than a full formal business plan.
- For funding-readiness users, Financial Projections, Startup Expenses, Cash Flow, Profit/Loss, and Personal Financial Statement may be relevant, but BOSS should not imply funding approval.
- For operating businesses, Business Health Check, SWOT, cash flow, financial statements, and job analysis can support operations triage and growth planning.

## Related SCORE links
- SCORE templates: https://www.score.org/templates/

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
